title: Policy: Policy Applied - Settings Locked
scenario: Verify that policy-applied settings on a Lens Cloud tenant are locked and greyed out in the mobile app, show a lock dialog on tap, update values when policy is updated, and lock all settings when policy affects all available settings.
steps: Apply a policy on a Lens Cloud tenant.
Open the mobile app and navigate to the affected settings.
Verify that the settings affected by the policy are properly applied and locked (greyed out).
Tap a locked setting and confirm that a dialog appears informing the user it is locked.
Update the policy with new values.
In the mobile app, verify that the setting values are updated accordingly while remaining locked.
Apply a policy that affects all available settings.
Verify that all settings are locked and greyed out in the mobile app.
expected: Settings affected by the policy are applied and locked (greyed out). Tapping a locked setting shows a dialog informing the user it is locked. Updating the policy updates the values while keeping settings locked. A policy affecting all available settings locks all of them.
